title: In-House Recruitment Program for Provincial Applicants
content: Applicants from the provinces who wish to avail of the in-house recruitment program of POEA-GPB must apply through the Regional Labor Center or Office. All applications received at the regional level are pooled and then forwarded to the POEA Head Office for processing.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
